reviews.comment:
Un desastre, reserve un turno con YPF box a las 6:00 de la mañana, y nunca me atendieron. Estuve 50 minutos esperando, me dijeron que "no encontraban las llaves". A nadie le importaba que se perdiera un cliente, todos encerrados para no tomar frío. Nunca más!

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! I booked an appointment at the YPF service station at 6:00 AM, and they never attended to me. I waited 50 minutes, and they told me they "couldn't find the keys." Nobody cared that a customer was being lost; everyone was locked inside to avoid the cold. Never again!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4bXJLYzVnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
